comment.body:
lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol lol
ha ha
www.shannynonline.cjb.net ( roar beautiful woman )
Having less than a handful of friends is the best thing in the world...
hah our bubble... maybe ronan shud get a job and then he can flood the house with cigarettes... bad habit anyway.
Happy Birthday xoxoxoxoxoxoxoxoxox

bud in a bottle carsberg in a can guinness in a glass
:D
<small>Ahahahaa. fuck. Give me an invite...i just need more prfiles.
I would but i dont have any. They arent giving them out any more - only way you can get one is from someone else who still has invites left.

bonjour mon copain! I have returned and am looking forward to seeing you very soon, hows about tuesday? Maybe monday i dunno, apparently i have this day trip thing. anyways, buns tomorrow somewhere? talk soon! missin ya! luv Rach xxx
hahahah,the reaction to the wasp at gaypride was incredable humorous
Oh yes - it is always a funny sight to watch

Oh, you...
(I'm not really gay)
..... how irrelevant
Indeed it is :D
Thanks - gona have to read some stuff on what to say in interviews so i can spit it all out (obviously making it sound oh so natural) and then get the job!

comment.subject: my dear hoover...
comment.body: my dyson i shall truely miss remind me to give it a kiss its irritation was not its fault phil lets go out for a malt .... with people from the internet. never realised id have to say bye to my hoover...
Yes we should - when do you move? Yeah you've told me before but i forget...
18th which is saturday week
i went to france too, heres my photos:
LOL nice pics - mine are better
I want a student account. I live in perpetual fear of being overdrawn...

Burnout is fun :D
mothers are meant to be bitches, its in the job discription, as they say.
where are you seeing HIM?
Ulster Hall! I cant wait!
you where at him...so was i...IT WAS HITE BECAUSE THEY WHERE SHITE. AND YOUR LITTLE DOG TOOO.
HUH? SHITE?? You thought it was shite??
i hate HIM.
pot noodles and cheap whores.
tescos tescos tescos....... and mates, girls love cooking for guys.
funny enough a hot girl cooked for me last night. Chicken goujons and chips, were really nice. And anyway its sainsburys - its only 5 min walk from the halls.
I'm going for the pirate look. There will have to be long hair and bearding involved. My first choice was Santa.
u r such a bitch. Damn jealousy. Will be big about it. Im going to see Snow Patrol so :-p

Philip dont worry about your mum and bro. I know u miss your bro but he will understand and you will see him soon. sweetie dont worry about the not meeting with me at least. I am always here and we can do it another time. And sure i got to see my sick daddy so it was okay. lol Chris
thanks

ooh u lasted 2 hours and 48 minutes chill about work decide now to do something (or not) then take it from here, its easy to let the panics take control
Breathe
soap is filth, YOU WILL DIE.

YAY
Congrats for making the right decision, hope you have a great time. But tell me more about it as you find out ok
I'll keep you posted
GO TO THE DOCTOR. Or just get someone to give you a horse tranquilizer hee hee

LOL
I remembered my medical card just after i left my block (for the second time) and i didnt want to go back again. I'll do it tomorrow.
quit with the drugs - it will not be helping you

Its amazing how u rediscover the joy in the little things when you are at uni. Clean bedsheets, sharpening a pencil...
Glad u slept well
here's a wee thought phil .. if you've only got £20 and complain about never having money...why buy a games console?

shushh, dont ruin it. Anyway - im getting next installment of loan at beginning of Jan, and i do have a job... I need to spend money, or else i get bored, and if i get bored i smoke, and i dont want that...
you stink.
... thanks
Quitting cigs is easy - just smoke joints instead. Trust me - it works!

comment.subject: It will get better alright
comment.body: You're at college, you magnificently hardworking brave pioneer. Weigh it up, you do deserve the it getting better. Incoming.
Who in the heck called you that. You are anything but mean and thoughtless. You are a gem of a man. Don't doubt yourself.
If someone called me mean and thoughtless, I would laugh at them. Just for comic effect, y'know.

congratulations knew you could do it btw, i have started not sleeping now, but whats worse is my sister let herself into the flat with her key, then came into my room, woke me and asked was it ok if she could sit there
How dumb can you get.
Want to kill her

Id notice Instantly
Chris xx
P.S. Joanne finally stopped puking (lovely imagery) - I felt like a proper doctor.
That. Is. Fan-fucking-tastic.
I want to have his babies. I love him SO much lol Im glad you had a semi good christmas (btw no credit so YAY SNOW!!!!!) Meet up soon?
Next week im free tuesday and wed morning and afternoon... Then not gonna work as much weeks after that. But definately soon!

Hey Sweetie, Shag is RIP on a Tuesday night now Tis now and forever more (or at least until they get bored) called Menage a trois.
Chris
I stand corrected...

Dont make rash decisions. You're right to give it time. But believe me, home is always a much nicer place when uve been away for a while lol.
Question: why a picture of a heart?? And oh yeah how was Slimers last night?

The Limelight was madness - I was so drunk, then went back to the flat and got drunker and... I cant remember oh yeah watched crappy movie and listened to music and stuff and I only got up at 4:30... Im really hungry and I've spent far too much money...
have you ever been a lady? have you ever dressed as a lady? do you wish you were a lady? are you a lady?

Hmm, I have been trying my darndest to come up with good questions. But I guess these'll have to do Have you ever resneted your brother for reasons he cant control? What do you think of Ronan? What is your biggest dream/ambition in life? What is your biggest fear in life? (Btw in one of my responses I wrote impenetrable jungle and it should be impenetrable forest - ah well)
No No No No

Sometimes, but not really. Only for the fact that he is younger than me, therefore gets away with things more than I do and seems to be liked more than me... I feel I have a good relationship with him anyway.
Ronan, hmm... pretty mixed opinion. Dont get me wrong, we are great friends. I trust him and I can talk to him about stuff. But he's lazy, selfish and arrogant... I think he should get a job and stick at it and do a little more than watch tv all day. Yeah I sit on my computer all day... but I have some communication with the outside world on a daily basis. I dont wanna seem to harsh, I love the guy and we are great friends.
Im really not sure of my biggest single ambition. I dont know exactly what I wanna do in terms of a career or job though. Yeah I like computers, though im not sure what else I am interested in if i was to choose something else. Other than that I believe the most important thing in life is happiness. I want to be happy in whatever I do. I want to travel the world, meet people, have lots of money and plenty of close friends. There's just so much beauty in the world.
Biggest fear... that would have to be being alone and not having anyone to talk to/confide in.

comment.subject: Heylooooooo
comment.body:
I agree with ya! hes a very huffy person!!!!
hey btw!!! wow...its justyne lol
feck 'em aint worth it hugs chris
Only if you post nude pictures of your neighbours, captured at 3am while perched on the trees outside their houses.
I cant promise anything...
Dammit man, you'll get those pictures or I'll see to it that you'll never work in this stinkin' city again!!
OOOoooOO is that a threat?

YAY!!
I want someone to do drugs with!! I pick you!!
Thanks - I feel the same way. Im dyin for some at the min!!
but do you *really* have to tell everyone else that you did? yu-uck
It's so funny because i know very few masculine hetrosexual guys.

hey phil
sorry to hear tis all a bit crappy
maybe taking a year out would be a good idea, who knows. ru allowed to do that at uni?
Yeah. No obligation to stay. Im trying to get visa at the min to go to the states for a few months...
Do it Phil! I dare you to!
listen...fuck your friends...I'll go.
fuck me? well I never mr denton. I am going to JJ72.

What a prick.
Sorry, but he is! ;-)
HEY!!! He's no prick! FUCK U!
I've been the same way lately. I try and limit my time online now. It may not seem like it, but I spend a lot less time online than I used to.
wank

On The Internet..I Talk To People On Msn..Whilst Listening To Music..And I Go On Websites..I Go Through My Faves Seeing If Anything Is Updated.If No One Is On Or Nothing Is Updated I Go Offline..Cause I Get Bored And Theres No Point Sitting Here If Im Bored.So Yep Thats What I Do..Arent I Exciting..Go Me!
why, what happened?
ach its ok - just pissin me off. How are you??
I have a habit of saying stuff i shouldnt...
His memory's shit - hopefully he'll forget!
You were drunk. I'm sure it's forgiveable.
ooops pilip what you do mow?
just get the damn shirt. you'll look groovy lol.
I got another shirt... Another FOUR shirts

Fuck me, I mean what the fuck is up with that. My flatmate had a little girl just walk past and roar in her ear, and then my sister and her mates were coming out of the moviehouse on the Dublin Road and some guy shouted abuse and then threw a cup of hot tea over my sister. What is the funckin deal with all the spidey shite and fighting. Its like they are a law unto themsleves. Fuck it we should all band together and kill them. A mass genocide.
Anyway on a lighter note, Phil I finished my exams, thank fuck (unless I have to repeat bits), so YAY
Grow a beard - spides don't touch you if you have a beard.
Ohh me too!
Yay!!:D
Glad you're having fun!:)
How exactly do you take pitures of a camera? Like, if you had a camera, why'd you need a new one?
Happy Birthday, sweetie! I'm glad you're having such a good time!:)
but i've missed you. xoxoxoxoxox
Come back! Come to Wisconsin this time!!
Try quitting!

just think about it this way...the sooner you quit, the healthier you'll be and the more money you can save for a return trip to the states...that should be reason enough for you to get rid of that nasty habit!
who'd ya call? We have gotta meet up soon so we can be nostalgic about a friggin amazing trip. Chris

I called Amy.
Yup we do have to meet up! - though after Fri 19th cos i have £20 to do me until then (and ronan is no better off).
Speak soon
Lightning is even better!
you have a real talent you know that
Thank you! That means a lot!
did u really enrol on a course, that is so cool I am SO jealous. You have a real gift, use it don't lose it. Send me some pictures sometime...
cool pic!:)
Class! I Love It!
Thanks :)
No you don't. You can do this. And you will feel so much better when you do. Be strong I know you can do it.
Thanks - not somewhere i would go in the dark...
I hear Sam Adams is amazing. Unfortunately, I've never tasted it myself. Still, one of the few American beers I've heard that is actually any good. Have to hunt it down !
glad u stopped by for a visit. lol Your blog is looking tip top. I love the pink stairs.

I like "Green Converse" a lot.:)
It's so good to see you embracing your talent!
Thanks :)
Too true. :\

I enjoyed it too, I had a great time.
And I love the photo. Thankyou.
Was thinking, we should meet up soon and exchange America photos, and I can get that music off you again.
Velma
I was thinking maybe somewhere other than the limelight... you know, just for a change.
what happened??
(at dads birthday party)

that sucks seriously.
I hate when that happens It happened to some of my friends a few weeks ago and they were pissed off. I meant to ask you did you go to Starsailor. Snow Patrol DJ is on in the Stiff Kitten on Dec 29th, sounds tempting.
Happy Christmas (in case I don't get to speak to u before it) How is the challenge coming?
Chris
I want some absinthe. :(
thats what i said - but you arent missing out much - i dont think - unless i just wasnt in the mood last night...
